response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced polyglot engineer with strong craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, open source) and some high-throughput systems work, but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 role centered on experimentation and growth systems. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated track record of leading multi-team, multi-workstream architectural initiatives at principal scope. Career trajectory is solid senior/staff product engineering, which falls meaningfully short of the role's core requirements.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, backend, and embedded, with required languages (C/C++, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, C#)
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, testing tools authorship, developer tooling, and recent AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of this role
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership or statistical/experimental analysis aptitude
Scope gap: experience is senior/staff product engineering, not principal-level multi-team architecture and cross-org influence

key_factors.factor: Scope below Principal/IC6 (no multi-team architectural leadership)
Strong general engineering fundamentals and distributed-systems exposure
